folio.label: 34r
folio.l: Is born ou©t of his sadel , a swerd lengthe
So hit hi~ Palamou~ , er he were take
But al for nougút , he was brou©t to æe stake
His hardy hert , mygút hi~ help rigút nougút
He must abide , whan that he was caugút
By force , and eke by composiciou~
¢ Who sorweth now , but wooful Palamou~
That mot nomore , gon a geyn to figút
And whan that Theseus , had seyn æis sigút
Vn to the folk , that foughten thus echon~
He cried hoo nomore , for it is don~
I wol be trewe Iugge , and no partie
Arcite of Thebes , shal haue Emelie
That by his fortune , hath hire faire I wonne
A non there is a noyse , of peeple bygonne
For ioye of this , so loude and hye with alle
It semed that the listes , shulde falle
¢ What can now , fayr venus don a boue
What seith she now , what dothe this Quene of loue
But wepeth so , wantyng of hire wylle
Til that hire teres , in the listes felle
She seide , I am a shamed douteles
¢ Saturnus seide , dougúter hold æin pes
Mars hatú his wylle , his knygút hatú al his bone
And be myn hede , æè shalt ben eesed sone
The trompoures , with the loude Mynstralsye
The heraudes , that ful loude , ©elle and crye
Ben in here wele , for Ioye of Daun Arcite
But herkenetú now , and stynteth noyse a lite
Whicú a miracle , there fel a non
This fiers Arcite , hath of his helm don~
And on a Courser , for to shewe his face
He preketú endlong , the large place
Lokyng vp ward , vp on this Emelye
And she a geyn hi~ cast , a frendly eye
And she was al his cher , as in his herte
Ou©t of the ground , a fire infernal sterte
Fro Pluto sent , at the request of Saturne
For whicú , his hors for fer , gan to turne
And lepte a side , and foundred as he lepe
And er that Arcite , may taken kepe
He pygút hi~ on the pomel , of his hede
That in the place , he lay as he were ded
His brest to brosten , with his sadel bowe
